title: Update init script or state defaults if needed
summary: Adjust zed-agentops-init.sh or baseline state defaults to ensure empty tx_event_log.jsonl is recognized as a valid initial state.
acceptance_criteria: Init script or baseline state defaults align with empty log handling.
No manual tx_event input is required to reach a valid baseline state.
Changes are limited to init/bootstrap paths.

steps.description: Review zed-agentops-init.sh and startup defaults for tx_event_log/tx_state handling.
Apply minimal updates to init script or defaults to align with empty log initialization behavior.
Add or adjust tests if init script changes impact behavior.

notes: Prefer minimal changes that only affect initialization.
Document any assumptions about pre-created empty files.
